message:
feat(python): numpy.isrealobj wrapper parity (franken_numpy-pgp4)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.isrealobj(x) returning True
iff input has a real (non-complex) dtype. Test covers float/int/
bool arrays (all True), complex arrays and complex-with-zero-imag
(both False — dtype rules), list-of-floats vs list-of-complex
distinction, 2-D real, and an !iscomplexobj cross-check across
all four representative cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
